en: My killers, my killers who will not take no for an answer.
ko: 내 암살자들, 내 암살자들, 거절을 받아들이지 않는.

en: My fucking warriors, who will not hang up the phone
ko: 내 개같은 전사들, 전화를 끊지 않는.

en: until their client either buys or fucking dies!
There is no nobility in poverty.
I have been a rich man and I have been a poor man
and I choose rich every fucking time.
Because at least as a rich man, when I have to face my problems, I show up in the back of a limo,
ko: 적어도 부자로서 문제에 직면할 때, 리무진 뒤에 나타나고,

en: wearing a $2,000 suit and a $40,000 gold fucking watch.
Now if anyone here thinks I'm superficial.
ko: 이제 여기서 누군가 내가 피상적이라고 생각한다면.
